response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, cloud technologies, and leadership across multiple roles, but his background leans heavily toward web, mobile, and embedded systems rather than large-scale cloud compute platforms. While he has worked with distributed systems and high-performance infrastructure, his C++ experience is limited to specific projects (e.g., NI LabWindows/CVI) and does not meet the 8-year minimum requirement. His leadership and mentoring experience is strong, but his cloud architecture depth is unclear.
strengths: Strong leadership and mentoring experience across multiple teams and projects
Proven ability to work with distributed systems, high-performance databases, and low-latency applications
Diverse technical expertise spanning C++, D, JavaScript/TypeScript, and cloud-native technologies
concerns: Limited C++ experience (does not meet the 8-year minimum requirement)
Unclear depth of cloud architecture and compute platform experience (preferred but not clearly demonstrated)
Most recent roles focus on web/mobile/AI-agent infrastructure rather than internal cloud compute platforms
